text: <par>The first syllable of this form is distinct from Baima <latinform>shɑ¹³ kɛ³⁵</latinform> 'flesh, meat'.</par>
<par>ngie: cf. Chang above (<latinform>ge</latinform>); lÅ=Batang le. Cf. 202?</par>

<par>The binomial roots Spiti <latinform>jo je</latinform> 'copulate' and Konyak <latinform>ya yiang</latinform> 'love (v.)' suggest that Baima <latinform>ʒɔ¹³</latinform> belongs with <xref ref="3470">#3470</xref>, while <latinform>iɔ¹³</latinform> descends rather from <xref ref="3475">#3475</xref>.</par>

<par>2nd morpheme here is a verb meaning ‘to let go, to release’ </par>
